title: Warm up
content: The slide presents three images depicting different cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image showcases unique scenery or activity associated with the city.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide features images related to transportation and iconic architecture in China, emphasizing the theme of modernization. It introduces the journey titled 'A Ride Through China' to explore the nation's development.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This slide outlines a process for investigating and researching local features, development strategies, and their positive impacts. The visual depicts an urban landscape, suggesting the interconnected nature of cities.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide connects three cities to their specific development strategies. Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The slide communicates that each city adopts unique strategies based on local features to drive development. It aligns with themes of sustainable development, economic growth, and technology integration.
